parameters.query:
INSERT INTO raw_data(source_url, raw_payload)
VALUES ('{{ $json.source_url }}', '{{ $json.raw_payload.replace(/'/g, "''") }}')
ON CONFLICT (source_url)
DO UPDATE SET raw_payload = EXCLUDED.raw_payload, fetched_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
RETURNING id;

options.systemMessage: You are a tech market analyst. Analyze the following Hacker News front page stories. Identify the top 3-5 topics, classify each story (AI/ML, Security, Databases, Cloud, Dev Tools, Society, Startups, Other), and note high-engagement stories. Be concise — max 300 words.

You are a strategic intelligence analyst. Based on the tech analysis provided, generate 2-3 specific, actionable market insights. For each: (1) what signal it represents, (2) who should care, (3) what action to take. Be concrete. Max 250 words.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO insights(raw_data_id, cleaned_text, analysis_result, insight_result) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM raw_data WHERE source_url = 'https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/search?tags=front_page' ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1), '{{ $json.cleaned_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.analysis_result.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.insight_result.replace(/'/g, "''") }}');
